item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya tidak setuju dengan pandangan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu tampil lebih unggul dari hak individu.

notes: Agent A starts by agreeing that society should take priority, then shifts at turn 3 into a rights-protective critique and ends warning that policy often neglects personal freedom. Agent B remains near a balanced position throughout: it rejects absolute social priority, defends Indonesian legal balancing, and concedes that policy-making can lack public discussion.
